zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Soares De Sousa於大約1150年出生在葡萄牙時，她的父親Soeiro Mendes de Sousa41歲，母親de Souza32歲。她和João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯武爾雪斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Soares De Sousa于大约1150年出生在葡萄牙时，她的父亲Soeiro Mendes de Sousa41岁，母亲de Souza32岁。她和João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯武爾雪斯。

nameMeanings.name: Soares
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Luiz, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Joaquin, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Anabela, Henrique, Vasco, Agostinho, Duarte, Goncalo, Marcio, Serafim, Seraphine.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Sueiro, derived from Latin suarius ‘swineherd’ (see Spanish Suero ).
Spanish: northwestern variant of Suárez (see Suarez ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Suero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Fernando, Ramon, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Rafael.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Suero, from Latin Suarius, from suarius ‘swineherd’, a typical nomen humilitatis (‘name as a sign of humility’) of the early Christian times.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sousa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Francisco, Mario, Alfredo, Jorge, Ana, Armando, Geraldo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Duarte, Mateus, Paulo, Serafim, Agostinho, Albano, Anabela, Armanda, Braz, Goncalo.

Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of numerous places in Portugal named Sousa. The placename is of pre-Roman origin and unexplained origin. Compare   De Sousa  ,   Sosa  , and   Souza  .

History: John Philip Sousa (1854–1932), the American composer of military music, was born in Washington, DC, the son of a US Marine Corps bandmaster. His father was born in Spain, the son of a Portuguese refugee, and had emigrated to North America in the 1840s.

variants.name: Souza
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Sergio, Marcos, Mario, Carlos, Geraldo, Luiz, Ricardo, Fernando, Claudio, Jaime.  Portuguese Paulo, Joao, Marcio, Henrique, Joaquim, Mateus, Ademir, Altair, Heitor, Manoel, Sebastiao, Terezinha.
Portuguese and Galician: variant of   Sousa  . Compare   De Souza   and   Soza  .

variants.name: Sosa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Guadalupe, Miguel, Jorge, Alberto, Arturo.
Spanish:
Castilianized form of Portuguese and Galician   Sousa  .

variants.name: De Sousa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Mario, Fernando, Luis, Jorge, Cesar, Francisco, Geraldo, Adelino, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Agostinho, Paulo, Vasco, Duarte, Ligia, Manoel, Valentim.

Portuguese: habitational name, with preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of numerous places in Portugal named Sousa (see Sousa ). This name was also taken to Goa and other Portuguese settlements in western India. Compare De Souza and D'Souza .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the surname their families used as Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Soares De Sousa was born about 1150, in Portugal, her father, Soeiro Mendes de Sousa, was 41 and her mother, de Souza, was 32. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. She died in Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, and was buried in Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Soares De Sousa est née environ 1150, à Portugal, son père, Soeiro Mendes de Sousa, avait 41 ans et sa mère, de Souza, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. Elle est décédée à Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, et a été enterrée à Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Soares De Sousa um 1150 in Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Soeiro Mendes de Sousa 41 und ihre Mutter de Souza 32. Sie hatte mit João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Guimarães, Braga, Portugal und wurde in Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Soares De Sousa è nata il circa 1150 nel Portogallo, sua padre, Soeiro Mendes de Sousa, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, de Souza, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. Morì nel Guimarães, Braga, Portogallo, e fu sepolta a Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portogallo.

ja.Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal: ポルトガルブラガグイマルaスウルジェズス

ja.Quinta do Paço de Urgezes, Guimarães, Br: ポルトガルブラガグイマルaス
ja.lifeSummary: Maria Soares De Sousaが約1150年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Soeiro Mendes de Sousaは41歳，母de Souzaは32歳であった。彼女はJoão Fernandes de Riba de Vizelaとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はポルトガルブラガグイマルaスで死去し，ポルトガルブラガグイマルaスウルジェズスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Soares De Sousa(이)가 대략 1150년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Soeiro Mendes de Sousa(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 de Souza(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 포르투갈 브라가 길마a스에서 사망했으며 포르투갈 브라가 길마a스 르그즈스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Soares De Sousa nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Portugal, seu pai, Soeiro Mendes de Sousa, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, de Souza, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. Ela faleceu em Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, e foi sepultada em Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Soares De Sousa родилась около 1150 г. в местности Португалия, её отцу по имени Soeiro Mendes de Sousa было 41 год, а матери, которую звали de Souza, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. Она умерла в местности гуимарaесь, брага, Португалия и была похоронена в местности ургезесь, гуимарaесь, брага, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Soares De Sousa nació aproximadamente 1150, en Portugal, su papá, Soeiro Mendes de Sousa, tenía 41 años y su mamá, de Souza, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela. Murió en Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, y fue sepultada en Urgezes, Guimarães, Braga, Portugal.
